recommendations.title: Haunted Hospital: Heilstatten
recommendations.overview: Group of Youtubers enter an abandoned surgery ward for 24-hour challenge, hoping to go viral. They will soon learn that they're not welcome.

recommendations.title: Deadgirl

recommendations.title: Little Monsters
recommendations.overview: A washed-up musician teams up with a teacher and a kids show personality to protect young children from a sudden outbreak of zombies.

recommendations.title: Infection
recommendations.overview: Infection takes place in a dark, isolated hospital, where one doctors mistake has led to dire consequences for a patient. In a hospital death is just a breath away.

recommendations.title: The Coffee Table
recommendations.overview: Jesus and María are a couple going through a difficult time in their relationship. Nevertheless, they have just become parents. To shape their new life, they decide to buy a new coffee table. A decision that will change their existence.

recommendations.title: Lucca's World
recommendations.overview: Determined to help her son, who has cerebral palsy, Bárbara takes her family to India for an experimental treatment.

recommendations.title: From a House on Willow Street
recommendations.overview: After a young woman is kidnapped, her captors soon come to realize that in fact they may be the ones in danger and this young woman has a dark secret inside her.

recommendations.title: Nise: The Heart of Madness

recommendations.title: Eli
recommendations.overview: A boy named Eli with a rare autoimmune disorder is confined to a special experimental clinic for his treatment. He soon begins experiencing supernatural forces, turning the supposedly safe facility into a haunted prison for him and his fellow patient
